posts.author: Tayla (Tayla)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI,
I can’t solve the “DataSource.Error: Web.Contents with the Content option is supported only during an anonymous connection”

I already did the anonymous authentication on data source settings, but stil continuous.

How can I solve this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Tayla,

Would you be able to please fill this form (https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=13855862562962) adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, board IDs, item IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @TestAPI17 and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?
